title: Elon Musk Just Shocked OpenAI With Grok 5
summary: xAI has reportedly completed training of Grok 5, a 1.5 trillion-parameter model. The system is positioned as a competitor to OpenAI and Anthropic, with particular focus on code generation and developer workflow learning through training on real development data.
